creator: martin@sugioarto.com
text:
Hi,

the port www/zend-framework does not build in Poudriere when using PHP 7.2 as default PHP version:

[00:00:05] Warning: (www/zend-framework): [00:00:05] Error: www/zend-framework depends on nonexistent origin 'security/php72-mcrypt'; Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.

--
Martin
